title: Bookmark
description: Continue reading where you left off! Saves the last page you were on in your book.
body:
# 🔖 Bookmark
- **Automatically bookmark** the page you were last on, even if you close the book unintentionally (i.e. disconnect).
- **Supports multiplayer**; show your friends your favourite page by flipping to it and handing the book over!
- **Lectern compatible**; the last page will be carried over when you place the book down and vice versa.
